name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Record one approved Codex Browser tab to a local, validated WebM file.

interface.shortDescription: Record an approved Browser tab to local WebM.
interface.longDescription: Captures the page content of one explicitly approved Codex Browser tab and produces a validated, audio-free VP8 WebM file on the local machine.
defaultPrompt: Record the approved Browser tab to a local WebM file.
